changes: Replaced 570-line generic SKILL.md with focused CSV analysis guide (~150 lines)
Added concrete Python/pandas patterns for exact operations needed (revenue calc, groupby, dedup, date standardization, email validation)
Fixed variable name reuse bug pattern (total_revenue overwritten in loops) by emphasizing unique variable names
Banned f-strings to prevent syntax errors that caused infinite edit loops on multi-dataset-report
Added instruction to rewrite entire file on syntax error instead of attempting edits
Added complete data cleaning workflow showing correct order: dedup first, then count issues on deduped data, then fix dates, then write CSV
Emphasized single-script approach for multi-file analysis to avoid running out of steps
Added cross-dataset report pattern using string concatenation instead of f-strings
